title: dianthus chinensis var. amurensis
intro: Dianthus chinensis var. amurensis, also known as the Amur dianthus or pink feather grass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Dianthus chinensis var. amurensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried for use in herbal remedies and supplements.
